setup.title: Set up your wallet
setup.description: Continue with Privy make you create your {{network}} wallet. Privy dey let you sign up with email or connect web3 wallet wey you get already. Any way wey e be, you go fit deposit, save, and withdraw USDC.
setup.error: We no fit set up your wallet. Abeg try again.
setup.securityNote: Your wallet dey settle money for Monad, and every movement dey record for the ledger. Sensitive things like withdrawal need fresh confirmation.
setup.unavailableDescription: Wallet provisioning never dey set up for this deployment yet. Abeg check back later.

intro.getReadyDescription: MoolaHub dey run on USDC over Monad. Set up your wallet make you fit deposit, save, and withdraw.
intro.manageDescription: MoolaHub dey run on USDC over Monad. Add USDC to your wallet, or send am go any Monad wallet address.

receive.title: Receive
receive.subtitle: Add USDC
receive.sendOnly: Send only <0>USDC on {{network}}</0> go this address.
receive.instructions: Send USDC go your address for up from any Monad wallet.
receive.instructionsSync: Send USDC go your address for up from any Monad wallet, then check for am:
receive.creditedDeposits: Dem credit {{count}} deposits wey be {{amount}} altogether

faucet.title: Testnet faucet
faucet.description: Collect test USDC make you try things before you use real money.

withdraw.title: Withdraw
withdraw.subtitle: Send USDC go any Monad address
withdraw.unavailable: On-chain withdrawal no dey available for this deployment right now.

footer.settle: Money dey settle go your own Monad wallet address, and every movement dey record for the ledger with on-chain reference.
footer.selfCustody: Your wallet na self-custody. You dey approve every withdrawal by signing am yourself.
footer.stepUp: Withdrawal and goal payout need fresh confirmation (password, 2FA, or code wey dem email) before anything go move.

banner.title: Connect your wallet for this session
banner.description: Connect once now and you go fit deposit, save, and withdraw without connecting again until you sign out.

privyWithdraw.connectPrompt: Your wallet na self-custody. Connect am make you sign the withdrawal yourself.

errors.unavailable: On-chain withdrawal no dey available for this deployment.
errors.invalidAddress: Enter correct Monad address (e dey start with 0x).
